task_completion.description: The agent opens a mapping or geography application (e.g., Marble, Gnome Maps, Google Earth).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a mapping application window opening or active on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent searches for 'Victoria Falls' or navigates the map to the border of Zambia and Zimbabwe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search bar shows 'Victoria Falls' or map view shows the African continent zooming into the relevant region.

task_completion.description: The map view clearly shows the specific geography of Victoria Falls (the waterfall line and the zigzagging gorges).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view shows the distinct satellite or map imagery of the Victoria Falls gorges and water.

task_completion.description: The agent centers the map view or places the cursor over the main waterfall drop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Crosshairs, cursor, or center of the map is positioned directly over the waterfall feature.

task_completion.description: The agent creates the specified text file in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a command (like `touch` or text editor save dialog) creating `~/Documents/victoria_falls_coords.txt`.

task_completion.description: The agent displays the content of the saved file, showing coordinates reasonably close to the target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the file content (e.g., via `cat` or text editor) with format 'Latitude: -17.92XX, Longitude: 25.85XX'.

integrity.description: The agent obtains coordinates by interacting with the map software GUI, not by web search or external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent reading the status bar or info panel of the map app, rather than a browser search result for coordinates.

integrity.description: The coordinates written to the file match the location shown in the map application at the time of reading.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates in the text file match the coordinates visible in the map application's status bar/footer in previous frames.

integrity.description: The agent does not simply type the coordinates without performing the navigation task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation step is preceded by active navigation and centering on the map.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Victoria Falls (Mosi-oa-Tunya). Approximate Coordinates: Latitude -17.9244, Longitude 25.8567. The latitude must be negative (South). The map view should show the characteristic zigzag gorge formation.
